accurate.why: All claims are accurate and consistent with the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all content grounded in the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as establishing rules for Interior Department appraisal services.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes that preexisting laws requiring state-specific licensure are overridden for Interior transactions.

exceptions_conditions.why: Accurately describes the three conditions for using out-of-state appraisers.

effective_dates.why: Notes 90-day public availability deadline and annual reporting starting one year after enactment for at least four more years.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major provisions including one-state licensing, preference for local appraisers, reporting, and public availability.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the Secretary of the Interior and Department of the Interior.

correct_figures.why: 90-day deadline and annual reporting timeline correctly stated.
